name: SPX Corporation
description: SPX Technologies, Inc. is a leading supplier of highly engineered products and technologies, holding prominent leadership positions in the HVAC and detection and measurement markets. Headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, the company focuses on delivering innovative solutions that improve efficiency, safety, and productivity for customers across various industrial sectors. Formerly known as SPX Corporation, the company continues to drive growth through strategic initiatives and a commitment to providing value-added infrastructure equipment, supporting critical applications in global markets while maintaining a strong emphasis on operational excellence and technological advancement.
